description: Land or resources belonging to or affecting the whole of a community; shared space. 'Laenu' names what belongs to all—the shared meadow, the community well, resources held in common.
sound_symbolism: The word shares openly. 'La' begins with open release, sharing initiated. The vowel 'e' opens to all. Then 'nu' grounds in collective holding, commons established.
grammatical_notes: Functions as a noun: 'lo laenu' (the commons). Central to sustainable community—resources managed collectively rather than privately.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Commons enable sustainability—shared resources managed for collective benefit rather than private extraction.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Commons sustained communities—shared lands for grazing, foraging, gathering that belonged to all.
